host_model_constraints: HAProxy and the repository-owned SPOP agent are separate processes; host and agent liveness and logs are distinct evidence.
Response phases run only when the HAProxy configuration sends the corresponding response notification to the agent.
Response-body notification and inspection are bounded and experimental; a mapper or agent code path alone is not runtime verification.
Starter and binding self-tests are not HAProxy host-runtime evidence.

connection_metadata.reason: The SPOP request message carries client and server endpoints into the libmodsecurity binding; canonical evidence is pending.

request_headers.reason: HAProxy request headers are encoded in the SPOP message and mapped into the transaction; canonical evidence is pending.

request_body_buffered.reason: The HAProxy configuration buffers the request and passes a bounded req.body sample to the agent; canonical Phase-2 evidence is pending.

request_body_streaming.reason: The current SPOP message carries one bounded body sample rather than a streaming body protocol.

response_headers.reason: An optional HAProxy response-check message maps response headers and the agent invokes Phase 3; canonical host evidence is pending.

response_body_buffered.reason: The optional response-check message and agent implement bounded experimental response-body inspection; canonical Phase-4 evidence is pending.

response_body_streaming.reason: The response path uses one bounded HAProxy response sample and does not implement a streaming transaction protocol.

phase1.reason: The request-check group executes connection, URI, and request-header processing in the agent; canonical evidence is pending.

phase2.reason: The agent appends the bounded request body and invokes request-body processing; canonical evidence is pending.

phase3.reason: The optional response-check group invokes response-header processing; canonical host evidence is pending.

phase4.reason: The bounded experimental response-body branch invokes response-body processing; canonical host evidence is pending.

phase4_rule_evaluation.reason: The bounded SPOA/SPOP response-body branch is present, but no current canonical HAProxy host run proves that Phase-4 rule 1100301 was evaluated.

phase4_pre_commit_deny.reason: The current agent emits policy-derived pre-commit fields but the HAProxy host runner does not capture a client-visible Phase-4 deny and actual commitment timing, so this semantic capability is not implemented.

late_intervention.reason: The current SPOE/SPOP response decision path is modeled before response commitment and implements no post-commit late-intervention point.

late_intervention_log_only.reason: The current HAProxy/SPOA path has no post-commit log-only action or host-observed unchanged-visible-status result.

late_intervention_abort.reason: The current HAProxy/SPOA path implements no controlled post-commit abort_connection action and no host-observed connection-abort result.

late_intervention_status_metadata.reason: Current diagnostics are policy-derived and the host runner does not capture original and visible client statuses plus actual commitment timing, so semantic late-intervention status metadata is not implemented.

deny.reason: The agent exports blocked/status variables and HAProxy maps them to explicit deny rules; canonical evidence is pending.

redirect.reason: The agent exports redirect URL/action variables and HAProxy has an explicit request redirect rule; canonical evidence is pending.

drop.reason: Although the harness contains a silent-drop host rule, the libmodsecurity binding does not currently preserve a distinct drop action into agent variables.

abort_connection.reason: The production binding does not expose a distinct abort-connection decision across SPOP.

log_only.reason: Non-disruptive ModSecurity decisions leave the HAProxy request allowed; explicit log-only behavioral evidence is pending.

transaction_id.reason: HAProxy unique IDs are carried as request IDs into the transaction and decision log; canonical correlation evidence is pending.

event_jsonl.reason: The production SPOP agent writes bounded metadata-only decision JSONL; canonical event-field and payload-absence evidence is pending.

config_inline_rules.reason: Inline rules are used only by binding self-tests and are not exposed by the production HAProxy/SPOP configuration path.

config_rules_file.reason: The production agent accepts a startup rules file and loads it into libmodsecurity; canonical config evidence is pending.

config_remote_rules.reason: The production HAProxy/SPOP configuration has no remote-rules option.

source_contract.reason: Agent, binding, mapper, metadata, and real-host harness sources are present; no canonical source-contract result is attached.

compile.reason: The production SPOP agent and binding have compile targets; no current canonical compile result is attached.

link.reason: The agent link path includes libmodsecurity and common sources; no current canonical link result is attached.

config_load.reason: The harness runs a real HAProxy configuration check; no current canonical result is attached.

start_smoke.reason: The harness can start HAProxy, agent, and backend without traffic; no current canonical result is attached.

minimal_runtime_smoke.reason: A real HAProxy-to-agent request path exists; no current canonical minimal-runtime result is attached.

no_crs_baseline.reason: The host and agent can consume shared no-CRS rules and cases, but no canonical baseline result is attached.

crs_smoke.reason: Legacy limited CRS smoke wiring exists and is not baseline evidence.

extended_matrix.reason: Extended-matrix verification is outside this canonical no-CRS declaration.
